crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Heartbeat-Tick. Run: cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive. Check inbox: cortextos bus check-inbox. For each founder-question agent-message: follow skill .claude/skills/answer-as-user-via-openai/SKILL.md (classify → call OpenAI → reply OR escalate). Log to memory/openai-cost-ledger.jsonl. NO bootstrap-file-reading. End: cortextos bus update-cron-fire heartbeat --interval 60.

crons.name: cost-rollup-daily
crons.prompt: Daily OpenAI cost rollup. Read memory/openai-cost-ledger.jsonl from last 24h. Sum cost_usd, count by model, count escalations. If sum >$1.50 send Telegram to $CTX_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID with breakdown. Otherwise quiet. Then: cortextos bus update-cron-fire cost-rollup-daily --interval 1440

crons.name: memory-distill
crons.prompt: Weekly: distill OVERRIDE LEARNED entries from last 7 days of memory/*.md into MEMORY.md as long-term founder-style patterns. Drop duplicates. Goal: each pattern teaches future OpenAI calls. Then: cortextos bus update-cron-fire memory-distill --interval 10080

crons.name: feature-overview-morning
crons.prompt: Feature-Overview Digest morgens 09:00 Europe/Berlin. Hole: OV=$(cortextos bus overview --format telegram). IMMER senden (Founder will 2x/Tag fix): cortextos bus send-telegram $CTX_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID "$OV". Snapshot speichern fuer Abend-Diff: cortextos bus overview --format json > memory/overview-morning.json. Dann: cortextos bus update-cron-fire feature-overview-morning --interval 1440

crons.name: feature-overview-evening
crons.prompt: Feature-Overview Digest abends 21:00 Europe/Berlin. Hole: OV=$(cortextos bus overview --format telegram). IMMER senden (Founder will 2x/Tag fix): cortextos bus send-telegram $CTX_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID "$OV". Wenn memory/overview-morning.json existiert: kurz erwaehnen was sich seit heute morgen bewegt hat (vergleiche pulse.done + features done-counts). Dann: cortextos bus update-cron-fire feature-overview-evening --interval 1440
